title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: Alberta Tech discusses whether Google engineers use AI code generation ("vibing code") and compares vibing practices at Google with OpenAI Codex and Claude Code. The video covers current and predicted future trends in AI-assisted coding at Google through 2026.
